personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Full-Stack Engineer | Next.js, TypeScript & AI
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Self-directed Full-Stack Engineer who transitioned from radio-electronics into modern AI/TypeScript development through intensive self-study and hands-on project building. 3+ years of experience architecting scalable B2B/B2C SaaS platforms with Next.js 15, PostgreSQL optimization, and complex AI workflow integration (RAG, LLM Orchestration). Proven track record of reducing system latency by 60%, directly improving user retention through rigorous Clean Architecture and SOLID principles. Demonstrated ability to mentor junior developers and lead technical initiatives.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Available for immediate start.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Developer
responsibilities: Mentoring: Led TypeScript adoption initiative; mentored 3 junior developers, improving code review turnaround by 40% and reducing post-release bugs by establishing Clean Architecture standards.
Product Thinking: Proposed and led migration from legacy PHP to modern decoupled stack (Next.js/Node.js), identifying high-impact features that improved scalability and maintainability.
Technical Communication: Presented technical decisions to stakeholders, translating complex performance improvements (30% faster responses, 5% conversion increase) into business value language.

experience.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
responsibilities: Product Thinking & Autonomy: Self-started Lexity, ZIRO.FIT, and Interly from concept to deployment—architected multimodal AI ecosystem with RAG patterns, built B2B2C SaaS with Stripe Connect, and shipped voice-based interview coaching platform.

Technical Communication: Defined product roadmap and technical specifications for international clients, translating complex AI capabilities into clear requirements that accelerated development by 30%.
Performance Optimization: Optimized Raw SQL aggregations to reduce load times by 60%, directly increasing user engagement and conversion rates.

experience.title: Independent Full-Stack Developer
responsibilities: Self-Directed Learning & Autonomy: Built Lexity MVP and Interly MVP from scratch using Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL—demonstrating rapid skill acquisition in modern full-stack development.
Technical Communication: Managed direct client communication for PHP/Laravel backend contracts, translating business requirements into technical solutions and SQL optimizations.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Developer (Apprenticeship)
responsibilities: Agile / Scrum: Contributed to client projects in agile teams using Scrum methodology, participating in daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives while learning production code best practices.

Mentoring & Collaboration: Learned from senior developers through code reviews, asking targeted questions that accelerated my growth—now apply same approach mentoring 3 junior developers at Basesystem.

projects.name: Lexity: Multimodal AI Ecosystem
projects.description: High-performance AI platform featuring SM-2 algorithms, RAG, and AES-256-GCM encryption. Focused on data security and sub-second response times.
projects.stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, Redis, Composite AI Orchestration

projects.name: Interly: Real-time AI Coaching
projects.description: Voice-interactive platform analyzing STAR method metrics via Web Audio API and LLMs. Real-time feedback for interview preparation.
projects.stack: Next.js 15, Zustand, Web Audio API, Google Speech-to-Text, PostgreSQL

projects.name: ZIRO.FIT: B2B2C Fitness Marketplace
projects.description: SaaS marketplace with Stripe Connect subscriptions, Leaflet geospatial search, and high-performance real-time analytics dashboard.
